```{r}
#| label: tbl-evalue
#| cache: true
#| cache.comments: false
#| tbl-cap: "E-value for the association between outcomes and ANOCA/Comparator"
#| tbl-pos: "H"

evaluefunc <- function(time, event, eventname, xvar = "case",
                       stratavar = NULL, col = 2) {
  levs <- levels(sdata %>% pull(!!sym(xvar)))
  nlevs <- length(levs)

  out <- data.frame(matrix(NA, ncol = 2, nrow = 1))
  colnames(out) <- c("Outcome", "E-value")

  out[1, 1] <- eventname

  coxvars <- modvars
  coxvars[coxvars %in% stratavar] <- paste0("strata(", coxvars[coxvars %in% stratavar], ")")

  ## 5 row - adjusted regression
  mod <- summary(coxph(
    formula(paste0(
      "Surv(", time, ",", event, "== 'Yes') ~ ", xvar, "+",
      paste(coxvars, collapse = " + "), "+ frailty(lopnrcase)"
    )),
    data = sdata
  ))

  evalc <- evalue(HR(mod$conf.int[1, "exp(coef)"], rare = TRUE),
    lo = mod$conf.int[1, "lower .95"],
    hi = mod$conf.int[1, "upper .95"]
  )

  out[1, 2] <- fn(evalc["E-values", 1], dig = 2)

  return(out)
}


out1 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[1],
  event = outvars$var[1],
  eventname = outvars$name[1]
)
out2 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[2],
  event = outvars$var[2],
  eventname = outvars$name[2]
)
out3 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[3],
  event = outvars$var[3],
  eventname = outvars$name[3],
  stratavar = "sos_com_hf",
  col = 2
)
out4 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[4],
  event = outvars$var[4],
  eventname = outvars$name[4]
)
nr <- 5
out5 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr]
)
nr <- 6
out6 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr]
)
nr <- 7
out7 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr],
  stratavar = "sos_com_cancer3y"
)
nr <- 8
out8 <- evaluefunc(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr],
  col = 2
)
outall <- rbind(out1, out2, out3, out4, out5, out6, out7, out8)

make_one_xlsxsheet(outall)

default_kable(outall) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "6cm")
```
